headline: Strong Q1 Beat And Governance Shift Could Be A Game Changer For Diamondback Energy (FANG)
summary: In May 2026, Diamondback Energy reported a strong first quarter with revenue, EPS and EBITDA all surpassing analyst expectations, while investors and analysts also emphasized its exposure to Middle East–related oil price shocks and its concentrated operations in the Permian Basin. At the same time, the company’s governance evolved as Travis D. Stice shifted from Executive Chairman to non-executive Chairman and senior leaders prepared to discuss Diamondback’s positioning and outlook at...
